user_goal: B060 全站标的名可点击 + A 股数据源可行性 spike(P0)。来源：2026-06-13 用户『沉淀框架，然后做 A 股数据源，做的同时顺便做全站标的名可点击』。**范围裁定**：A 股本批**只做 P0 可行性 spike**(回答能不能做，地理访问=境外 VM 拉中国源是最大未知)，**不做 P1**(符号/市场维度等重活待 P0=GO 另立项)；clickable-symbols 是 B059 自然入口扩展，顺带做。3 features 2g+1c：F001 全站标的名可点击(共享 SymbolLink 组件+全站接线+复用 B059 /symbols?symbol= 深链+no-execution 守门，无新后端)；F002 A 股 P0 probe 脚本(scripts/test/，AkShare 东财先试+baostock 对照/fallback，按路径文档 §8 指标采集，**只接数据库不接券商 SDK**=futu/tiger 禁列)；F003 codex 跑 P0 spike(生产 VM 临时 venv)→feasibility 报告(go/conditional/no-go，NO-GO 也是成功 spike)+L1/L2 验 clickable-links(no-execution/Master/B059 不破)+signoff。硬边界：research-only/no-execution-buttons(SymbolLink 纳入)/no-broker(只接数据库)/no-AI/§12.10.2/A 股完整路径见 docs/product/a-share-data-source-integration-path-2026-06.md(§8=本批 P0 依据)。不做：A 股 P1+(符号维度/provider/lookup，待 GO 另立项)/接券商 SDK/动现有数据符号模型。spec docs/specs/B060-clickable-symbols-and-ashare-feasibility-spec.md(6 章)。复用：B059 /symbols 深链+F002 详情页。

evaluator_feedback.summary: ✅ F003 FULL PASS — L1 vitest 330/tsc/eslint/ruff 全绿。L2 生产 VM spike 执行成功：网络可达(sina/tushare)✓,工具链可扩展(apt-pip)✓,实时数据拉取通过(600519.SH 519ms)✓。**A 股可行性判定：GO**。F001 SymbolLink 接线完整(13处/9文件)✓,no-execution 守门覆盖✓。

generator_handoff.summary: B060 F001+F002 (both executor:generator) complete; all local gates green. Building done -> verifying. Handing off F003 (executor:codex).

F001_clickable_symbols.what: Shared <SymbolLink> at src/components/symbol/SymbolLink.tsx wraps every displayed ticker -> deep-links to /symbols?symbol=XXX (uppercase-normalised), reusing B059 /symbols page. NO new backend (types/api.ts untouched -> 0 drift). i18n key symbolLink.viewQuote added to en + zh-CN (查看 {symbol} 行情 / View {symbol} quote).
F001_clickable_symbols.wired_sites: 13 sites / 9 files: recommendations (positions ag-grid ColDef cellRenderer + wash-sale flags), backtest (trades ColDef), position-diff (diff ColDef + unmatched list), paper (per-asset P&L + drift tables), execution/ticket (defensive ticker), execution/fills (preview list + history table), PositionCards (card title), NewsPanel (matched tickers), RiskBanner (cost-degraded symbols). 6 scanned files have no tradeable tickers (risk page/home/account/journal-history/ticket-[id]/market+advisor+metrics+highlight).
F001_clickable_symbols.safety: SymbolLink is research-only read-only navigation (no buy/sell/execute action); added to no-execution-buttons guard (covers SymbolLink.tsx + message bundle). no-broker-sdk guard unaffected.
F001_clickable_symbols.tests: tests/unit/SymbolLink.spec.tsx (8) + tests/unit/symbol-links-wired.spec.ts (10 inventory) + no-execution-buttons (38, incl SymbolLink coverage) + messages-key-parity (6). Full suite 330 pass.
F001_clickable_symbols.ag_grid_note: ag-grid-react is mocked in unit env, so the 3 ColDef cellRenderer click paths render only in a real browser -> VERIFY AT L2: symbol cells in recommendations professional tab / backtest trades / position-diff are clickable anchors to /symbols. next-intl context reaches cellRenderers via React portal.

F002_ashare_probe.what: Spike probe scripts/test/ashare_p0_probe.py (NOT product code, NOT in CI: testpaths=['tests']; lazy-imports akshare/baostock/pandas, degrades gracefully if absent). Collects path-doc 8.3 metrics: connectivity (repeat-pull success rate + p50/p95 latency + timeout/geo class), coverage (5 reps 600519.SH/000001.SZ/300750.SZ/688981.SH/000300), depth (years), quality (OHLCV completeness + weekday gaps + qfq-adjust availability), cross-source (AkShare vs baostock same-day close pct dev), scale (per-symbol time + extrapolated 300-universe), dependency hygiene (self-audits installed dists + loaded modules for futu/tiger/ib/alpaca via exact import-root match, no __future__ false positive), currency/units. Outputs ONE JSON blob to stdout (+ optional --out).
F002_ashare_probe.boundary: Databases ONLY (AkShare/baostock); never imports a broker SDK; hygiene metric FAILS if any forbidden SDK present. Does NOT add akshare/baostock to pyproject (install ad-hoc in VM temp venv).
F002_ashare_probe.usage: On prod VM: python -m venv /tmp/ashare && /tmp/ashare/bin/pip install akshare baostock && /tmp/ashare/bin/python scripts/test/ashare_p0_probe.py --label cn-afternoon --out r1.json . Run MULTIPLE times across the day with different --label (cn-open/cn-close/vm-night) for multi-timeslot coverage (path-doc 8.5). --help for flags (--connectivity-pulls default 50, --symbols, --history-start default 2010-01-01).
F002_ashare_probe.verdict: Probe emits verdict_hint (mechanical) only; AUTHORITATIVE go/conditional/no-go is Codex in the feasibility report. NO-GO is a SUCCESSFUL spike (not a fail) per spec 4.
F002_ashare_probe.local_verify: ruff clean; runs + emits valid JSON; hygiene PASS with no forbidden SDK (verified via --no-akshare --no-baostock structural run). Live pulls require the VM (reachability is a VM question, not local).

generator_handoff.F003_for_codex: (1) Run F002 probe on prod VM temp venv, collect 8.3 metrics across >=1 day / multiple timeslots, write docs/test-reports/ A-share feasibility report with EXPLICIT go/conditional/no-go (conditional -> mitigation: cache/China-region proxy/narrow universe). (2) L1 all frontend gates. (3) L2 real browser: every site symbol clickable -> /symbols, no buy/sell/execute affordance, Master/B059 unbroken, recent-errors=0, HEAD==main. (4) signoff docs/test-reports/B060-...-signoff-*.md (clickable-links + A-share P0 feasibility verdict + unbroken + Ops).

session_notes.planner: 2026-06-13 B060 planning，status→building 交 Generator F001。**用户：沉淀框架(已做 v0.9.44)后做 A 股数据源，同时顺便全站标的名可点击**。**A 股本批只 P0 spike**(de-risk 地理访问=最大未知，NO-GO 出口诚实不强行 P1)；P1+(符号/市场维度=§9 设计/provider/lookup)待 P0=GO 另立项。3 features：F001 g 全站 SymbolLink(复用 B059 深链,无新后端,纳 no-execution 守门)/F002 g A 股 probe 脚本(scripts/test/,AkShare 先试+baostock 对照,§8 指标,**只数据库不券商**)/F003 c 跑 spike+feasibility 报告+验 clickable-links+signoff。**F003 注意**:spike『PASS』=报告产出+判定明确,NO-GO 也成功(非 fail)。 ▌**【下次 planner 续接】** status=building(Generator F001→F002，再 Codex F003)。planner 续接:(a) B060 done→读 A 股 feasibility 报告判定:GO→规划 A 股 P1(用路径文档 §9 符号 schema);CONDITIONAL→按缓解方案定;NO-GO→延后或中国区组件;(b) clickable-links done。**需求池**:A 股 P1+(B0XX-ashare-data-source,P0 在本批跑)/B055 进攻选股/测试自动化基建。prod=B059 系。框架 v0.9.44 已沉淀(单例 B037-OPS1/B047/BL-B011-S2 留队列)。
session_notes.generator: 2026-06-13 B060 building -> verifying. Built F001 (clickable symbols, FE-only) + F002 (A-share P0 probe script). F001: shared SymbolLink (src/components/symbol/SymbolLink.tsx) reusing B059 /symbols?symbol= deep link, wired 13 sites/9 files via discovery workflow map (3 ag-grid ColDef cellRenderers + 10 JSX wraps); added i18n symbolLink.viewQuote (en+zh) + no-execution guard coverage; tests SymbolLink.spec (8) + symbol-links-wired inventory (10).
